sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97173" key="strepta/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στρεπτ-άριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a <sense id="n97173.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twist</tr_> of lint (cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στρεπτός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:11:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.3</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
